code:
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: ONLY a single number: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5
    - Do NOT output any explanation, text, symbols, or punctuation
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
    - Explicit repurchasing/gifting behavior mentioned despite minor issues →5
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Multiple product failures within short timeframe
    - Replacement units showing same defects →1
    - Updates negating initial satisfaction with explicit warnings →1
    - Dangerous defects/complete failure of core function

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - Functional but significantly worse than cheaper alternatives →2
    - Creates new problems (odor/noise) during operation →2
    - Short lifespan despite proper use & maintenance →2

    3 Stars (Neutral / Mixed):
    - Temporary solutions needing future replacement →3
    - Conflicted tone with equal satisfaction/dissatisfaction →3

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Regular maintenance impacts convenience →4
    - Explicit star deduction for specific flaws →4
    - Style/design praise with functional limitations →4

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - Exceeds skeptical expectations through core utility →5
    - Maintenance presented as justified tradeoff →5
    - Solves persistent problems despite minor flaws →5
    - Sustained enthusiasm through multiple use cycles →5

    BOUNDARY CLARIFICATIONS:
    - "Requires weekly cleaning" + frustration →4 vs "Worth cleaning for results" →5
    - Initial skepticism overcome →5 vs neutral performance →4
    - Multiple negative comparisons →2 vs single limitation →4
</DynamicRules>
</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: "UPDATE: Replacement failed in 2 months. Never buying again!"
<Reasoning>Multiple failures with definitive rejection</Reasoning>
<Rating>1</Rating>

Example 2:
Review: "Leaves chemical odor - worse than not cleaning at all"
<Reasoning>Introduces new operational problems</Reasoning>
<Rating>2</Rating>

Example 3:
Review: "Adequate until I can afford better solution"
<Reasoning>Temporary adequacy without commitment</Reasoning>
<Rating>3</Rating>

Example 4:
Review: "Napkins stay crisp but require ironing after every wash"
<Reasoning>High maintenance reduces convenience</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 5:
Review: "Between pets and kids, this cleaner keeps surprising me!"
<Reasoning>Exceeded skeptical expectations through core performance</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 6:
Review: "This throw is warm but not durable - deducting a star"
<Reasoning>Explicit deduction for material flaw</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 7:
Review: "Solved decade-old stain issues despite weekly deep cleans"
<Reasoning>Transformative benefit justifies maintenance</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 8:
Review: "Works better than old model but still misses spots"
<Reasoning>Partial improvement with limitations</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 9:
Review: "Magazine organizers work perfectly when full - exactly needed!"
<Reasoning>Unqualified praise for core functionality</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 10:
Review: "Compact design rusted quickly. Looks great but flawed."
<Reasoning>Style praise with functional failure</Reasoning>
<Rating>2</Rating>

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
artifacts_json:

  4 star: OK

  gold 4 -> 5: 15
  gold 5 -> 4: 14
  gold 1 -> 4: 1
  gold 3 -> 2: 1
  gold 2 -> 3: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "I have only used this once so far, but I really like it. It is easy to operate once you figure out the steam buttons...lol! The scrubber was effective and it cleaned a pretty sticky kitchen floor. Next..on to my tile."

  2. Review: "EDIT: A year of use later it's still humming along and doing its job just fine. Sometimes it seems like it doesn't pick up quickly that it should be upping its speed on its own in the auto setting, but maybe it's just taking longer for the air to rea..."

  3. Review: "this everyday throw is soft and cuddly and will get lots of use from your family. They will be covering up in this throw because it is warm. It is also nice looking. The chevron pattern is up to date and the colors go with many decors. This throw is ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "If you're looking for a very budget priced bed skirt, this would be it. I have two twin beds in my guest room and after spending more than enough on all the other bedding and decorative pillows and such on them, I knew I needed bed skirts but hated p..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "UPDATE
==================================
We purchased this Procter-Silex toaster in 2013 and it lasted 3 years.  We were okay with that.

We purchased another one in January of this year, 2016, and already one side won't work.  Less than 2 months is..."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [3, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "This is a good, though not extra ordinary storage bin. It lacks exceptional build quality, exceptional attention to detail, or anything that's all that remarkable. It looks good, and the pattern is timeless, plus it keeps stuff together. You could do..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "I like the Stasher Snack bag. It is the perfect size for snacks on the go. I also like that you can store, cook, put in the microwave or even in the dishwasher! This is great for small treats. Don't try to overstuff. You don't want the seal to get fo..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "Returned. Only because I decided to go with tiles and not a rug"
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 5, 3] | Disagreement: 0.33
  2. Review: "I've never tried an air purifier before, though I know people who have/had them. This one was not impressive. First, it has an odor. I don't know if it's because of impurities that emit a smell once trapped in the gadget and exposed to heat from the ..."
     Gold: 2 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [2, 2, 1] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "If there's anything you ever thought you wanted or needed in a trash can, this one has it. First, it's a semi-round, so it seems to have a smaller footprint than traditional round cans. Second, it has a silent opening and soft closing, which is great..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 38 errors, 13 borderline out of 80 examples."}
